_description: LinkStack stack — the upstream application image is repackaged via app/linkstack/Dockerfile (themes + entrypoint). The monitor tracks the base image digest and triggers a release when it moves. Database is SQLite (no separate DB image).

images.name: linkstack
images.description: LinkStack app — base image for app/linkstack/Dockerfile (linkstack build). Consider pinning to a SemVer tag for reproducibility.
